metadata.description: Test cases for module and package validation

literal.string: valid camelCase term def: no error
valid single-letter term def: no error
underscore in term def name: error
definition with matching namespace: no error
two definitions in order: no error
two definitions out of order: error
uppercase first letter of segment: error
multi-error accumulation: two distinct rules produce two findings
warning classification: both rules demoted to warnings
rule disabling: duplicate-name rule omitted from profile
maxErrors bound: only first rule collected when maxErrors=1
